(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1 (just b1 on table)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 2 (b3 on b2, b2 on table)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 4 (b7 on b6 on b5 on b4, b4 on table)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 12 (b19 on b18 on ... on b9 on b8, b8 on table)
    (on-table b8)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (clear b19)
    
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1: height 1 (b1 stays on table, unchanged)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2: inverted (b2 on b3, b3 on table)
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3: inverted (b4 on b5 on b6 on b7, b7 on table)
      (on-table b7)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4: inverted (b8 on b9 on b10 on ... on b19, b19 on table)
      (on-table b19)
      (on b18 b19)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (clear b8)
    )
  )
)

Looking at this problem, I need to figure out the initial tower configurations and then invert each one.

**Initial towers (4 towers of heights 1, 2, 4, 12):**

Let me assign blocks to towers:
- Tower 1 (height 1): b1 (on table)
- Tower 2 (height 2): b3 on b2 (b2 on table)
- Tower 3 (height 4): b7 on b6 on b5 on b4 (b4 on table)
- Tower 4 (height 12): b19 on b18 on b17 on b16 on b15 on b14 on b13 on b12 on b11 on b10 on b9 on b8 (b8 on table)

**Goal (invert each stack):**
- Tower 1: b1 still on table (single block, unchanged)
- Tower 2: b2 on b3, b3 on table
- Tower 3: b4 on b5 on b6 on b7, b7 on table
- Tower 4: b8 on b9 on b10 on b11 on b12 on b13 on b14 on b15 on b16 on b17 on b18 on b19, b19 on table

```lisp
(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19)
  (:init
    (arm-empty)
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1)
    (on-table b1) (clear b1)
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b3 on b2
    (on-table b2) (on b3 b2) (clear b3)
    ;; Tower 3 (height 4): b7 on b6 on b5 on b4
    (on-table b4) (on b5 b4) (on b6 b5) (on b7 b6) (clear b7)
    ;; Tower 4 (height 12): b19 on b18 on ... on b9 on b8
    (on-table b8) (on b9 b8) (on b10 b9) (on b11 b10) (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12) (on b14 b13) (on b15 b14) (on b16 b15) (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17) (on b19 b18) (clear b19)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted (single block, same)
      (on-table b1) (clear b1)
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on b3
      (on-table b3) (on b2 b3) (clear b2)
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b4 on b5 on b6 on b7
      (on-table b7) (on b6 b7) (on b5 b6) (on b4 b5) (clear b4)
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b8 on b9 on b10 on ... on b19
      (on-table b19) (on b18 b19) (on b17 b18) (on b16 b17) (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15) (on b13 b14) (on b12 b13) (on b11 b12) (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10) (on b8 b9) (clear b8)
    )
  )
)
```
